my.title: My credentials
my.subtitle: Your personal AI provider token. Stored encrypted per-user; workflows you start use this instead of the deployment default.
my.mismatch: Your admin switched the AI provider to {{adminProvider}}. Your {{userProvider}} credential is paused — connect the new provider below to keep running workflows.

ai.opencodePlaceholder: Leave blank for LM Studio / Ollama

help.shell: On macOS / Linux, run cat ~/.claude.json in your shell and copy the output.
help.fields: Takuto only needs the <code0>oauthAccount</code0> block (with <code1>accountUuid</code1>, <code2>emailAddress</code2>, and <code3>organizationUuid</code3>) but pasting the full file is fine — the server ignores extra fields.
help.bearer: The bearer token is still set separately on the API key tab.

helper.claudeSession: Required for Pro/Team accounts whose local `claude` uses `/login`. Takuto reads `oauthAccount` from this blob and writes it to the worker's `.claude.json` at workflow start. The bearer token is still set separately on the API key tab.
helper.cursor: Cursor accepts only an API key. Generate one at cursor.com/dashboard and paste it above.
helper.claude: For direct Anthropic API or proxies that accept the same API key format. If you're on Pro/Team and your local `claude` uses `/login`, use 'Claude Code session' instead.
helper.codex: OpenAI API key (sk-…). The Codex CLI reads OPENAI_API_KEY from the worker environment — Takuto bridges this from the value you paste here.
helper.opencode: Optional bearer token for your self-hosted OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave blank for LM Studio / Ollama or any unauthenticated server. For private gateways requiring auth, paste the bearer the server expects.
helper.default: Paste the API key issued by your provider.

github.title: GitHub
github.appModeHint: Takuto is using its GitHub App. Workflows run as the bot. Add a personal access token below if you want commits and PRs attributed to you.
github.patOnlyHint: No shared GitHub App is configured. Takuto can only talk to GitHub via a personal access token — without one, GitHub-touching workflows won't start.
github.attributedNote: Your commits, PRs, and PR comments are attributed to you. The GitHub App handles read-only API calls.
github.attributeHelp: Your GitHub username and email will appear as the author on commits, PRs, and review comments. Cryptographic signing is a v2 feature.
github.patHelp: Required scopes: <code0>repo</code0> (classic) or <code1>contents:write + pull_requests:write + issues:read</code1> (fine-grained). <ghLink>Help me create one →</ghLink>
github.patHelpAria: Open GitHub PAT creation page (opens in a new tab)

toast.ssoRequired: GitHub SSO required. Authorize at {{url}} and try again.
toast.saveError: Could not save your GitHub token.
